name: Cerebra Legal MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Cerebra legal AI platform — an AI-powered legal research and document analysis system. Enables AI agents to search legal databases, analyze legal documents, find case law, research statutes, and leverage AI-powered legal intelligence for legal workflows and due diligence.
use_cases: Legal research and case law search from AI legal assistant agents
Analyzing legal documents and contracts for due diligence agents
Querying statutes and regulations from legal compliance agents
Building AI-powered legal research workflows using Cerebra's legal AI
not_for: Teams without access to Cerebra legal platform
Replacing qualified legal counsel (informational research tool)
best_when: A legal tech team or law firm using the Cerebra platform wants AI agents to leverage Cerebra's legal intelligence capabilities for research, document analysis, and compliance workflows.
avoid_when: You don't use Cerebra. Also: legal AI tools should supplement, not replace, professional legal advice — ensure proper oversight of AI legal outputs.

auth.notes: Cerebra platform API key required. Access to Cerebra legal platform subscription needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Cerebra is a paid legal AI platform
pricing.paid_tiers: Cerebra subscription pricing for legal AI access
pricing.notes: Cerebra is a paid platform. MCP server is free open source (yoda-digital community implementation).

performance.rate_limits: Cerebra API rate limits per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: Requires paid Cerebra platform subscription — not free to use
Legal AI outputs must be reviewed by qualified legal professionals before acting on them
Community MCP implementation (yoda-digital) — may not stay current with Cerebra API changes
Legal data sensitivity — query logs may contain privileged legal research
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal research may include privileged information. API key for Cerebra. HTTPS. Legal data is highly sensitive — ensure Cerebra's data handling meets your firm's compliance requirements.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal research data is sensitive and potentially privileged. API key. HTTPS. Verify Cerebra compliance certifications.
